title: Wheat — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match, magnitude consistent with FAOSTAT's 1961 starting value (2.7M t in 1958 vs 2.87M t in 1961).

title: Barley — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match.

title: Rice — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: CAVEAT: WB source explicitly labels this row 'Rice (milled)'; FAOSTAT's Rice production item is paddy/rough-rice-equivalent, not milled -- not directly comparable tonne-for-tonne (milled is ~65-70% of paddy weight). Apparent near-doubling 1958->1961 (320k->600k) plausibly reflects this unit-basis gap plus real growth, not investigated further; flag prominently when splicing.

title: Dates — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: CAVEAT: unexplained jump from 125,000t (1958) to FAOSTAT's 300,000t (1961), more than double in 3 years -- could be genuine surge, definitional change, or revision; not reconciled, flag the gap rather than smoothing it (same treatment as the citrus bridge's own honest gap).

title: Almonds — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: CAVEAT: WB row is 'Almonds (shelled)'; FAOSTAT item is 'in shell' -- different basis (shelled kernel weight is roughly half of in-shell weight), not unit-converted here.

title: Pistachios — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match: WB 'unshelled' = FAOSTAT 'in shell', same basis.

title: Walnuts — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: CAVEAT: WB row is 'Walnuts (shelled)'; FAOSTAT item is 'in shell' -- different basis, not unit-converted here.

title: Hazelnuts — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match: WB 'unshelled' = FAOSTAT 'in shell', same basis.

title: Other Nuts — Production (pre-1961 extension)
extends_chart_id: faostat__Other nuts (excluding wild edible nuts and groundnuts), in shell, n.e.c.__production
notes: Reasonable residual-category match, not an exact name match.

title: Sugar (processed) — Production (pre-1961 extension)
extends_chart_id: faostat__Raw cane or beet sugar (centrifugal only)__production
notes: JUDGMENT CALL, not an exact name match: WB 'Sugar' (55-108k t, 1950-58) is far too small to be raw sugarcane/beet crop tonnage (FAOSTAT Sugar beet alone was 810k t in 1961) -- magnitude and trend (108k in 1958 -> 150k in 1961, ~12%/yr) instead line up with FAOSTAT's processed/centrifugal sugar output. Treat as processed-sugar output, not raw crop production.

title: Tea — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Reasonable match, magnitude/trend consistent (7k t 1958 -> 10.9k t FAOSTAT 1961, ~56% growth over 3 yrs plausible for Iran's then-rapidly-expanding tea sector) though WB doesn't specify green-leaf vs made-tea basis.

title: Unmanufactured Tobacco — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match, raw leaf tobacco both sides.

title: Cotton (lint) — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: JUDGMENT CALL: WB 'Cotton' magnitude (70k t in 1958) and growth trend match FAOSTAT's Cotton lint (115.6k t in 1961) far better than Seed cotton (376k t in 1961, would require an implausible 5x jump in 3 years) -- classified as lint, not seed cotton, on that basis.

title: Wool (shorn, greasy) — Production (pre-1961 extension)
extends_chart_id: faostat__Shorn wool, greasy, including fleece-washed shorn wool__production
notes: Clean match.

title: Cotton Seed — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Exact name match.

title: Pulses, Total — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: Clean match, magnitude consistent (140k t 1958 vs 160k t FAOSTAT 1961).

title: Vegetable/Edible Oils — Production (pre-1961 extension)
notes: JUDGMENT CALL: no generic 'Vegetable Oils' aggregate exists under FAOSTAT QCL production for Iran (only individual named oils); FAOSTAT's oilseed-conversion aggregate 'Oilcrops, Oil Equivalent' is the closest existing concept and its magnitude/trend is plausible (22k t 1958 -> 50k t FAOSTAT 1961), but this is a conversion-factor aggregate vs. WB's directly reported oil output -- definitional difference, not reconciled.

title: Bank Melli Cost-of-Living Index, 7 Cities (pre-1960 extension)
notes: WDI's Iran CPI starts exactly in 1960, the year immediately after this index ends -- but different base year (Dec1955=100 vs WDI's 2010=100) and near-certainly different basket methodology (Bank Melli 7-major-city basket vs. WDI's national CPI construction). Present as two separate labeled segments, never rescaled/spliced into one continuous index.

title: Other Grains — Production, 1950-1958
notes: WB-defined residual grain category (excludes wheat/barley/rice); no single FAOSTAT item matches this specific aggregation.

title: Vegetables & Melons (combined) — Production, 1950-1958
notes: WB combines vegetables and melons into one row; FAOSTAT tracks 'Vegetables Primary', 'Cantaloupes and other melons', and 'Watermelons' as separate items -- no combined equivalent.

title: Fresh Fruits (non-citrus) & Berries — Production, 1950-1958
notes: FAOSTAT's 'Fruit Primary' aggregate includes citrus; no non-citrus-only fruit aggregate exists to match.

title: Dried Apricots — Production, 1950-1958
notes: FAOSTAT tracks fresh 'Apricots' production only for Iran (checked QCL/FBS/price files); no dried/processed apricot production series exists to extend.

title: Raisins — Production, 1950-1958
notes: FAOSTAT tracks fresh 'Grapes' production only for Iran; no dried-grape/raisin production series exists to extend (checked QCL/FBS/price files).

title: Other Dried Fruits — Production, 1950-1958
notes: WB residual dried-fruit category; no FAOSTAT equivalent.

title: Animal Fats (aggregate) — Production, 1950-1958
notes: FAOSTAT only tracks unrendered fat per species (buffalo/cattle/camel/goat/sheep/pig) for Iran, no single cross-species 'Animal Fats' aggregate to match.

title: Crop Area, Production & Gross Value by Commodity, 1960
notes: Primary new contribution is the GROSS VALUE IN RIALS dimension (no registry chart tracks Iran agricultural output value in local currency at any date). NOTE: the Area/Production sub-columns for Wheat/Barley/Rice/Cotton/Sugar beet/Tobacco/Tea/Pulses would also individually extend the same 1960 gap as the matching pahlavi__*_production_1950_1958 rows above -- not separately staged as extends to avoid double-counting; noted here and in the folder README instead. Also note: this table's own 'Cotton' production figure (298k t) is far closer to FAOSTAT's Seed Cotton magnitude than the OTHER WB table's 'Cotton' figure (70k t, classified above as lint) -- the two WB tables likely use different cotton-basis conventions from each other; flagged, not reconciled.

title: Livestock Product Quantity & Gross Value, 1960
notes: Primary new contribution is the GROSS VALUE IN RIALS dimension by livestock product (meat/dairy/wool/hides) -- no registry chart tracks this. Quantity sub-columns overlap conceptually with existing FAOSTAT meat/milk/wool/hides production items but are a single-year (1960) snapshot only, not staged as separate extends rows.

title: Merchandise Exports by Commodity (Value, USD), 1956/57-1958/59
notes: FAOSTAT's trade charts (faostat__X__trade) track export QUANTITY only, never value -- no existing chart_id for commodity-level export VALUE at any date. 14 commodities incl. raw cotton, carpets, fruits, wool, hides. Oil excluded (see pahlavi_oil_energy_series/). Cross-reference for a future pass: the 'Carpets' row here (1956/57-1958/59) sits immediately before data/processed/specialty_goods_series/carpet_exports_1960_1988.csv (1960 onward) -- a real splice opportunity once specialty-goods series are folded into the registry.

title: Merchandise Imports by Commodity (Value, USD), 1956/57-1958/59
notes: Same reasoning as the exports-value chart: FAOSTAT trade charts are quantity-only. 19 commodities incl. sugar, textiles, machinery, iron & steel, automotive, tea.

title: Ocean-Borne Trade Tonnage, Excl. Petroleum, 1950/51-1959/60
notes: No WDI logistics/trade-tonnage indicator reaches this far back for Iran (WDI's Logistics Performance Index only starts 2007). Earliest multi-year foreign-trade tonnage series in the project.

title: Oil Revenue by Allocation (Budget/NIOC/Plan Org/B.P.C.), 1955/56-1962/63
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran oil revenue by fiscal-recipient allocation at any date. 1959/60-1962/63 are Plan Organization estimates (8%/yr assumed growth), not actuals -- flagged per-row in the processed CSV.

title: Oil Export Volume & Revenue by Paying Company, 1963/64-1970/71
notes: Natural continuation of pahlavi__oil_revenue_by_allocation_1955_63 in time but a DIFFERENT classification (revenue by paying company vs. by receiving allocation) -- both introduced fresh in this same batch (registry has no prior oil-revenue chart of any kind), so this is 'new' rather than 'extends' by the strict definition (nothing pre-existing in CHART_REGISTRY.csv to extend). Export-volume figures also overlap conceptually with owid__oil_production_volume (both physical oil-export/production quantities) but measure a different thing (exports vs. total production).

title: Domestic Oil Consumption by Product, 1964-1969
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran's domestic oil consumption broken out by product (fuel oil/gas oil/kerosene/gasoline). Kerosene is of particular household-consumption interest (heating/cooking fuel pre-electrification).

title: Petroleum Statistics: Drilling, Production, Sales, Exports, Price, 1956-1958
notes: IMPORTANT CAVEAT: the 'Production' sub-metric of this table (physical volume, million m3) OVERLAPS in time and concept with the already-registered owid__oil_production_volume chart (OWID's Iran series already runs continuously from 1900) -- this is an alternate/cross-check source line for years OWID already covers, NOT a gap to extend; per reconciliation policy, keep as a separate labeled line if ever charted alongside OWID, never averaged. The rest of the table (drilling wells/meters, internal sales volume, export volume, posted crude price) has no existing equivalent at all and is genuinely new.

title: Natural Gas Production, Consumption & Flaring, 1965-1969
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran natural gas production/consumption/flaring at any date. Shows flaring dominating over consumption (81.6% of Consortium production still flared in 1969), well before the 1970s National Iranian Gas Company trunk-pipeline buildout.

title: Electric Power Generation by End-Use (incl. Residential), 1968-1972
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran electricity generation broken out by end-use sector at any date (WDI's per-capita consumption series only starts 1990 and is never sector-split). This project's first direct measure of Iranian household/residential electricity consumption specifically. Unit (million kWh) is inferred from context, not printed on the source page -- flagged in the processed CSV.

title: Installed Power Generating Capacity by Prime Mover, 1970-1971
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran installed generating capacity by prime-mover type (diesel/steam/gas/hydro) or by named dam (incl. the Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi, Amir Kabir, and other dams) at any date.

title: AIOC Net Profit, UK Tax Payments & Iran Royalty Payments, 1910-1951
notes: Pre-nationalization era, no registry equivalent (and no other source in this project reaches this far back on oil-sector finance). Category assigned 'External Debt' as the closest existing WDI-derived category label for cross-border company-to-government financial flows; genuinely sui generis, could equally sit under a dedicated 'Oil & Energy' category once one exists in the consolidated registry.

title: Consortium Disbursements in Iran incl. Aggregate Oil-Sector Wage Bill, 1954-1962
notes: No registry chart tracks an aggregate oil-sector wage bill for Iran. Direct hit on 'historical wage data for well-documented occupations' -- oil-industry wages are unusually well documented due to the Consortium Agreement. This is an aggregate paid-out total, not a per-worker rate.

title: Oil Industry Employment by Nationality, 1939-1960
notes: No registry chart tracks Iran oil-sector employment, let alone split by nationality, this far back. Captures the 1951-54 nationalization-crisis employment collapse (data gap in source itself, not filled).

title: Oil Industry Personnel by Company & Labor Category, 1955-1961
notes: Finer-grained companion to pahlavi__oil_industry_employment_by_nationality_1939_60 (splits by employer AND category, not just nationality). 1958 has a genuine 5-unit source-internal discrepancy in the printed grand total, preserved as-is per the no-fabrication rule.

title: Oil Revenue Distribution by Recipient (% share), 1957-1959
notes: A third classification of oil-revenue allocation (percent share, not absolute value), overlapping years with pahlavi__oil_revenue_by_allocation_1955_63 but not arithmetically derived from it -- kept as a separate chart per this project's overlapping-sources policy.
